question: How do I get my Cloudbox folder set up on a new laptop?
resolution_summary: Walked customer through downloading the desktop installer, signing in, and confirming the Cloudbox folder appears with initial sync in progress.

question: I signed up but never got the verification email.
resolution_summary: Asked customer to check spam folder; email was there. Confirmed verification completed.

question: Do I need to pick a plan right away when I sign up?
resolution_summary: Explained Free plan (5GB) is available immediately and upgrades can happen anytime from Settings > Plan.

question: What's the difference between the Plus and Family plans?
resolution_summary: Explained Plus is 200GB single-user at $9.99/mo, Family is 1TB shared across up to 6 members at $16.99/mo.

question: If I upgrade mid-cycle, am I charged the full price again?
resolution_summary: Clarified upgrades are prorated for the remainder of the current billing cycle, not charged at full price.

question: I want to downgrade from Business to Plus, when does it kick in?
resolution_summary: Explained downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing cycle; current storage stays available until then.

question: Can I switch my Family plan from monthly to annual billing?
resolution_summary: Confirmed switch can be done anytime from Settings > Plan, effective immediately with prorated credit for unused monthly time.

question: I cancelled my monthly plan, can I get a refund for this month?
resolution_summary: Explained monthly charges are non-refundable but cancellation prevents future renewal charges; customer keeps access until period end.

question: I bought the annual plan 3 days ago and want a refund, how do I do that?
resolution_summary: Confirmed customer is within the 14-day refund window and walked through Settings > Plan > Billing History > Request refund.

question: It's been 40 days since my annual renewal and I want my money back, the product doesn't fit my needs.
resolution_summary: Outside the standard 14-day window; escalated to billing specialist for case-by-case review of account history.

question: My card was charged twice this month for the same subscription, is that a bug?
resolution_summary: Checked with customer that only one line item settled in Billing History (the other was a processor retry that didn't complete); no action needed.

question: Both charges from my invoice #4471 dispute actually settled on my bank statement, I need this fixed.
resolution_summary: Confirmed two charges settled; escalated to billing specialist to investigate and reverse the duplicate.

question: Where can I download an invoice for my accountant?
resolution_summary: Pointed to Settings > Plan > Billing History for PDF invoice downloads.

question: My renewal payment failed, will I lose my files?
resolution_summary: Explained 3 retry attempts over 7 days, and that account downgrades to Free (not deleted) if all retries fail; files stay intact above the cap.

question: How do I add our company's VAT number to invoices?
resolution_summary: Directed to Settings > Plan > Billing Details on the Business plan to add a VAT ID for future invoices.

question: I updated my credit card, will I be charged again right now?
resolution_summary: Confirmed updating payment method doesn't trigger an immediate charge; new card is used at next billing date.

question: A folder of 2000 photos has been stuck on 'syncing' for two days.
resolution_summary: Checked for long file paths and antivirus interference; had customer add Cloudbox to AV exclusions, sync resumed.

question: One specific file keeps failing to sync with a generic error.
resolution_summary: Found filename contained an illegal character (:); renamed file and sync succeeded.

question: Sync says 'paused' and won't resume no matter what I click.
resolution_summary: Diagnosed low disk space on customer's laptop; freeing 5GB allowed sync to resume automatically.

question: How do I force Cloudbox to rescan everything from scratch?
resolution_summary: Walked through Settings > Sync > Advanced > Rebuild sync database, explained it's safe and doesn't delete files.

question: A file that fails to sync gives an error code I've never seen, even after trying your basic troubleshooting steps.
resolution_summary: Basic steps didn't resolve it; escalated to engineering to check server-side sync logs for this file.

question: Why do I have a file called 'report (Conflicted copy 2026-03-01).docx'?
resolution_summary: Explained conflicted copies happen when the same file is edited offline on two devices; showed how to compare and merge.

question: How can I stop getting so many conflicted copies with my teammate?
resolution_summary: Recommended staying online/synced more often and considering a co-editing format for frequently shared documents.

question: Is it safe to just delete the conflicted copy file?
resolution_summary: Confirmed deleting a conflicted copy is safe once you've kept the version you want; doesn't affect ongoing sync.

question: How do I make a shareable link for a single file?
resolution_summary: Showed right-click > Copy Cloudbox link workflow on desktop.

question: Can I password protect a link before sending it to a client?
resolution_summary: Confirmed password protection is available under Manage link and walked through setting it.

question: I shared a link by mistake, how do I kill it immediately?
resolution_summary: Directed to Settings > Shared > Links > Delete link, confirmed it invalidates the URL immediately.

question: I'm on the Free plan and can't create any more share links.
resolution_summary: Explained Free plan cap of 10 active links; customer deleted an old link to free up a slot, or can upgrade for unlimited links.

question: How do I invite my whole team to a shared project folder?
resolution_summary: Walked through right-click > Share folder and entering teammate emails.

question: Can I make someone a viewer-only on a shared folder so they can't edit?
resolution_summary: Confirmed Viewer permission level is available from Manage access and set it for the requested member.

question: An employee left and their shared folder is now read-only for everyone, how do we fix ownership?
resolution_summary: Ownership wasn't transferred before account closure; escalated to a workspace admin/support to reassign folder ownership.

question: Is there an activity log showing who deleted a file from our shared folder?
resolution_summary: Confirmed 90-day activity log is available under Manage access > Activity on the Business plan.

question: How do I turn on two-factor authentication?
resolution_summary: Walked through Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication > Enable and scanning the QR code.

question: I lost my phone with my authenticator app and have no backup codes saved.
resolution_summary: No backup codes available; escalated to security team for identity verification (ID + recent invoice) to restore access.

question: Can I get 2FA codes by text message instead of an app?
resolution_summary: Explained SMS-based 2FA isn't supported, only authenticator apps and backup codes, due to SIM-swap risk.

question: How do I generate new backup codes, I think I used all of mine?
resolution_summary: Directed to Settings > Security > regenerate backup codes, noting old codes are invalidated.

question: There's a device signed into my account I don't recognize from another country.
resolution_summary: Treated as a potential security incident; escalated directly to the security team rather than handling as routine, after advising immediate password change.

question: How do I see which devices are logged into my account?
resolution_summary: Showed Settings > Security > Devices listing device name, OS, and last active time.

question: If I revoke an old laptop, does it delete the files that are on it?
resolution_summary: Clarified revoking only cuts off future sync access; files already on the device are untouched.

question: My web session keeps logging me out after about a month.
resolution_summary: Explained web sessions expire after 30 days of inactivity by design.

question: New photos on my phone aren't showing up in Cloudbox automatically.
resolution_summary: Found Camera Upload was disabled after an app reinstall; re-enabled it and photos began uploading.

question: How do I view a file offline on my phone during a flight?
resolution_summary: Showed the 'Make available offline' option from the file's three-dot menu.

question: Camera upload keeps stopping in the background on my Android phone.
resolution_summary: Diagnosed aggressive battery optimization killing the app; added Cloudbox to the exclusion list, uploads resumed reliably.

question: Can I limit camera upload to Wi-Fi only so it doesn't eat my mobile data?
resolution_summary: Confirmed Wi-Fi-only toggle exists under Settings > Camera Upload in the mobile app.

question: I'm out of storage, will my existing files get deleted?
resolution_summary: Reassured customer existing files stay safe and accessible; only new uploads are blocked until space is freed or plan upgraded.

question: My usage looks way higher than the files I can actually see, why?
resolution_summary: Explained version history and owned shared-folder content count toward quota; had customer check Trash and old file versions.

question: Does emptying trash actually free up my storage quota?
resolution_summary: Confirmed trashed files still count until permanently deleted; emptying trash frees the quota immediately.

question: What's 'online-only files' and does it change my cloud storage usage?
resolution_summary: Clarified it only affects local disk usage, not cloud storage quota.

question: How do I generate an API token for our internal automation?
resolution_summary: Walked through Settings > Developer > API Tokens on the Business plan and choosing read-only vs read-write scope.

question: We're hitting rate limit errors on the API, what's the cap?
resolution_summary: Explained 1,000 requests/hour/token limit and pointed to the X-RateLimit-Remaining header to back off proactively.

question: Our webhook for file uploads stopped firing for just our account two days ago, everything looks right on our end.
resolution_summary: Config looked correct on customer's end; escalated to a support engineer to check server-side webhook delivery logs for the account.

question: How do I verify that a webhook payload actually came from Cloudbox?
resolution_summary: Explained payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 using the account's webhook secret, and how to verify it.

question: How do I download all my files before closing my account?
resolution_summary: Directed to Settings > Account > Export Data to prepare a downloadable zip of everything.

question: I closed my account by accident yesterday, can I get it back?
resolution_summary: Within the 30-day window; escalated to support to reverse the closure and restore full access.

question: It's been over 30 days since I closed my account and I need a file back.
resolution_summary: Explained deletion after 30 days is permanent and cannot be reversed by support or anyone else.

question: We received a GDPR data deletion request from a former customer, how do we handle it in Cloudbox?
resolution_summary: Outside the standard account-closure flow; escalated to the privacy/legal team to handle the compliance request.

question: My Mac won't let me open the Cloudbox installer, says it's from an unidentified developer.
resolution_summary: Walked through approving the app in System Settings > Privacy & Security to bypass Gatekeeper block.

question: How do I check what version of the desktop app I'm running?
resolution_summary: Showed tray/menu-bar icon > Settings > About to view current version and force an update check.

question: If I uninstall the desktop app, do my synced files disappear from my computer?
resolution_summary: Clarified uninstalling stops syncing only; existing local files remain untouched as regular files on disk.

question: Can I sync two different Cloudbox accounts on the same PC at once?
resolution_summary: Explained one account per app instance; pointed to multi-instance setup guide or using the web app for the second account.
